seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Sukhothai 2026 — Budget to Boutique
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotel in Sukhothai for your budget. Our 2026 guide covers 12 top-rated properties from backpacker hostels to boutique resorts — with real prices, locations and honest tips.

intro: Sukhothai is one of the most budget-friendly destinations in Thailand, where excellent accommodation rarely exceeds 2,500 THB per night. Hotels cluster in two areas: Old Sukhothai (near the Historical Park) for convenience to the ruins, and New Sukhothai (the modern town, 12 km east) for better dining and nightlife options. Most visitors stay one or two nights — enough to explore both the main park and Si Satchanalai. Below are 12 properties across budget, mid-range and boutique categories with real 2025/2026 prices.

hotels.name: Dorm of Happiness by Tharaburi
hotels.description: One of the most charming budget options near the ruins, Dorm of Happiness offers both dormitory beds and private rooms in a peaceful garden setting just minutes from the Historical Park entrance. The property is part of the Tharaburi Resort complex, giving budget guests access to the resort's grounds and atmosphere. Clean rooms, friendly staff and a tranquil garden make it exceptional value for Sukhothai.
highlights: Walking distance to Sukhothai Historical Park
Shared garden area with the upscale Tharaburi Resort
Both dorm beds and private rooms available
Bicycle rental available on-site
Peaceful garden setting with hammocks

hotels.name: Old City Guest House
hotels.description: A long-running backpacker favourite located near the Historical Park, Old City Guest House offers basic but clean rooms with fans or air-conditioning, a communal area where travellers share tips, and reliable bicycle rental. The owner is a wealth of local knowledge and helps with transport to Si Satchanalai. Simple, no-frills and exactly what budget travellers need in Sukhothai.
highlights: Close to the Historical Park entrance
Bicycle rental for exploring the ruins
Helpful owner with local knowledge
Both fan and A/C rooms available
Communal area for meeting other travellers

hotels.name: Ruean Thai Hotel
hotels.description: A beautifully built traditional Thai-style hotel in New Sukhothai with ornate handmade wood carvings, a swimming pool and well-maintained grounds. Despite the boutique appearance, prices remain firmly in the budget category. Located near the bus terminal, it is convenient for arrivals from Bangkok or Chiang Mai. The pool area is a welcome bonus after a hot day cycling the ruins.
highlights: Traditional Thai architecture with handmade wood carvings
Swimming pool — rare at this price point
Near the bus terminal in New Sukhothai
Restaurant serving Thai and Western food
Air-conditioned rooms with hot water

hotels.name: Orchid Hibiscus Guest House
hotels.description: A highly regarded guesthouse just 800 metres from the Historical Park entrance, Orchid Hibiscus offers modern, beautifully decorated rooms, bungalows and houses set in landscaped tropical gardens with a swimming pool. The Dutch-Thai owners provide excellent hospitality, free bicycles for exploring the park, and a wealth of local advice. Consistently one of the top-rated properties in Sukhothai across all review platforms.
highlights: 800 metres from the Historical Park entrance
Free bicycles for guests
Swimming pool surrounded by tropical gardens
Range of room types: rooms, bungalows, houses
Excellent Dutch-Thai hosts with local knowledge

sources.sourceName: Orchid Hibiscus Guest House — Official Website

hotels.name: Tharaburi Resort Sukhothai
hotels.description: A serene resort set among rice paddies and gardens near the Historical Park, Tharaburi Resort blends traditional Lanna-style wooden architecture with modern comfort. The spacious rooms feature polished teak floors and balconies overlooking the grounds. The swimming pool, on-site restaurant and peaceful atmosphere make it an excellent mid-range base for exploring the ruins. Their sister property, Dorm of Happiness, offers budget options.
highlights: Traditional Lanna-style wooden architecture
Set among rice paddies near the Historical Park
Swimming pool with garden views
On-site restaurant serving Thai cuisine
Spacious rooms with teak furnishings

hotels.name: Sukhothai Treasure Resort & Spa
hotels.description: Located between New and Old Sukhothai on Highway 12, Sukhothai Treasure Resort offers a good balance of comfort and affordability. The resort features spacious rooms around a large swimming pool, a spa and a restaurant. While not as atmospheric as properties right at the park, the larger rooms and resort-style amenities make it a solid mid-range choice, especially for families.
highlights: Large swimming pool with sun loungers
On-site spa for post-cycling massages
Spacious rooms with modern amenities
Restaurant and bar on-site
Good value for resort-style facilities

hotels.name: Phiphu Art and Gallery Boutique Sukhothai
hotels.description: An artistically designed boutique property just 1.4 km from the Historical Park, Phiphu combines modern architecture with art gallery spaces. Each room features unique artwork and design elements inspired by Sukhothai's cultural heritage. Free bicycles, free parking and a genuine artistic atmosphere set it apart from the standard guesthouse options in the area.
highlights: Unique art-gallery concept with curated artworks
Free bicycles for guests
1.4 km from the Historical Park
Free private parking
Modern design with Sukhothai-inspired art

hotels.name: Le Charme Sukhothai Resort
hotels.description: A well-run resort in New Sukhothai with spacious rooms arranged around a large swimming pool and tropical gardens. The location in town puts you close to restaurants, the night market and the bus terminal, while the resort itself feels like a peaceful retreat. Popular with both Thai and international travellers, it offers reliable mid-range comfort with good service.
highlights: Large swimming pool and tropical gardens
Walking distance to New Sukhothai restaurants and night market
Near the bus terminal for easy arrivals/departures
Air-conditioned rooms with modern bathrooms
On-site restaurant with Thai and international menu

hotels.name: The Legendha Sukhothai Resort
hotels.description: The most atmospheric hotel in Sukhothai, Legendha is designed as a traditional Thai village with wooden houses, raised walkways and lush tropical gardens. Located just minutes from the Historical Park with views towards Wat Chang Lom, it creates an immersive experience that complements the ancient ruins perfectly. The rooms are spacious with Thai-style furnishings, and the restaurant serves excellent local cuisine. Breakfast is included.
highlights: Traditional Thai village design with wooden houses
Views towards Wat Chang Lom and the Historical Park
Lush tropical gardens with lotus ponds
Excellent on-site restaurant with local cuisine
Swimming pool surrounded by tropical landscaping
Breakfast included in room rate

hotels.name: Sriwilai Sukhothai Resort & Spa
hotels.description: The most upscale property in Sukhothai, Sriwilai blends heritage-inspired architecture with modern luxury. Located 1.8 km from the Historical Park and surrounded by rice paddies, it offers spacious suites, a spa, a fine dining restaurant and an infinity pool overlooking the countryside. The design draws on Sukhothai-era aesthetics — clean lines, natural materials and water features — creating a sophisticated retreat that feels integrated with the landscape.
highlights: Heritage-inspired architecture with modern luxury
Infinity pool overlooking rice paddies
Full-service spa with Thai massage treatments
Fine dining restaurant with local and international cuisine
1.8 km from the UNESCO Historical Park
Spacious suites with premium furnishings

hotels.name: Sukhothai Heritage Resort
hotels.description: A boutique resort near the Historical Park that combines traditional Thai architecture with comfortable modern rooms. Set in peaceful gardens with a swimming pool, Sukhothai Heritage Resort offers a quieter alternative to the larger properties. The attentive staff, well-maintained grounds and proximity to the ruins make it a reliable upper mid-range choice.
highlights: Traditional Thai architecture in peaceful gardens
Swimming pool and well-maintained grounds
Close to the Historical Park
Attentive, friendly staff
Restaurant serving Thai cuisine

hotels.name: Foresto Sukhothai Guest House
hotels.description: A friendly, well-kept guesthouse surrounded by greenery near the Historical Park. Foresto offers simple but comfortable rooms in a garden setting with a communal area where travellers gather in the evenings. Free bicycle use, helpful English-speaking staff and a peaceful atmosphere make it a favourite among travellers who prefer Old Sukhothai's quiet village feel over New Sukhothai's town conveniences.
highlights: Garden setting near the Historical Park
Free bicycle use for guests
English-speaking staff with local tips
Quiet, peaceful atmosphere
Good communal area for socialising
